subject: Parm - Holiday heroes
body:
Support Robin Hood by using Parm for your holiday catering.

View this email in your browser (http://us6.campaign-archive1.com/?u=4f040df2280591b22593c52f1&id=240e238825&e=8e61a1e378)

http://robinhood.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4f040df2280591b22593c52f1&id=3d2477b452&e=8e61a1e378
This holiday season, by letting Parm do your catering, you can help fight poverty in NYC.

Parm (http://robinhood.us6.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=4f040df2280591b22593c52f1&id=c87202c2f8&e=8e61a1e378) , named one of "NYC's Best Sandwich Shops" by Zagat, is proud to partner with Robin Hood.

When you order from Parm's newly launched catering menu and enter code ROBINHOOD, Parm will donate 10% of your order price to New Yorkers in need.
Choose from delicious sandwiches, shareable salads and other Parm specialities. Order online for your office, family or friends today!

www.parmnyc.com/catering
Enter code: ROBINHOOD in the "referred by" field.

For questions or help with menu selection, please email
catering@parmnyc.com (mailto:catering@parmnyc.com) .

============================================================
